steps.title: Prepare protein samples with LDS sample...
steps.instruction: Prepare protein samples with LDS sample loading buffer (supplemented with β-mercaptoethanol).

steps.title: Load equal amounts of protein (total cell lysate
steps.instruction: Load equal amounts of protein (total cell lysate: 20-40 µg protein, purified protein: 1 ug) into the wells of a precast NuPAGE 4-12% BisTris gel, alongside molecular weight markers for reference.

steps.title: Run the gel for 01:00:00 at 170 V, Room temperature
steps.instruction: Run the gel for 01:00:00 at 170 V, Room temperature . Use MOPS running buffer.

steps.title: Activate polyvinylidene fluoride (PVDF) membrane in methanol ( 00:00:05 )
steps.instruction: Activate polyvinylidene fluoride (PVDF) membrane in methanol ( 00:00:05 ).

steps.title: Transfer for 01:00:00 at 100 V...
steps.instruction: Transfer for 01:00:00 at 100 V (or alternatively, Overnight at 30 V) in a cold room.

steps.title: Place the cassette in the transfer...
steps.instruction: Place the cassette in the transfer tank with an ice block to maintain low temperature. Fill with transfer buffer containing 20% methanol.

steps.title: Assemble transfer sandwich and make sure...
steps.instruction: Assemble transfer sandwich and make sure no air bubbles are trapped in the sandwich.

steps.title: Block 01:00:00 in TBS-T supplemented with...
steps.instruction: Block 01:00:00 in TBS-T supplemented with 5% non-fat dry milk, at Room temperature

steps.title: Incubate the blot with primary antibodies...
steps.instruction: Incubate the blot with primary antibodies ( 01:00:00 ; 1:1,000 dilution in TBS-T, 1% BSA), Overnight at 4°C.

steps.title: Wash the blot 3 times for...
steps.instruction: Wash the blot 3 times for 00:05:00 in TBS-T, at Room temperature .

steps.title: Incubate the blot with HRP-conjugated secondary...
steps.instruction: Incubate the blot with HRP-conjugated secondary antibodies ( 00:45:00 ; 1:1,000 dilution in TBS-T, 1% milk), at Room temperature .

steps.title: Wash the blot 3 times for...
steps.instruction: Wash the blot 3 times for 00:05:00 in TBS-T, at Room temperature .

steps.title: Apply enhanced chemiluminescence (ECL) substrate to...
steps.instruction: Apply enhanced chemiluminescence (ECL) substrate to the blot and detect protein signals using the Bio-Rad ChemiDoc MP imaging system.

steps.title: Analyze protein band intensity using ImageJ software ( http://fiji
steps.instruction: Analyze protein band intensity using ImageJ software ( http://fiji.sc ; RRID:SCR_002285).

steps.title: Normalize protein levels to loading controls (e
steps.instruction: Normalize protein levels to loading controls (e.g. GAPDH).
